name: revit_create_room_volume_direct_shapes
description: Creates Generic Model DirectShape volumes from room ClosedShell geometry and stores room parameters as JSON in Comments.

level_id.description: Optional level filter for rooms to process

room_ids.description: Optional subset of room element ids to process

overwrite_existing.description: When true, delete prior DirectShapes whose ApplicationDataId matches a room UniqueId before creating new ones

notes: Returns created DirectShape element ids; overwrite_existing is not yet implemented in the command.
